author: Kingma & Welling (2013)
title: Auto-Encoding Variational Bayes
why: Fondasi VAE, generatif probabilistik yang paling gampang dicerna duluan

author: Goodfellow et al. (2014)
title: Generative Adversarial Networks
why: Induknya semua GAN, wajib paham dulu sebelum varian lain

author: Mirza & Osindero (2014)
title: Conditional Generative Adversarial Nets
why: GAN dikasih label biar output bisa dikontrol, tambahan simpel

author: Radford et al. (2015)
title: Unsupervised Representation Learning with Deep Convolutional GANs
why: DCGAN, resep arsitektur GAN pakai CNN yang stabil ditiru

author: Gatys et al. (2015)
title: A Neural Algorithm of Artistic Style
why: Neural style transfer klasik, konsep content vs style loss

author: Johnson et al. (2016)
title: Perceptual Losses for Real-Time Style Transfer and Super-Resolution
why: Style transfer feed-forward realtime pakai perceptual loss

author: Ledig et al. (2016)
title: Photo-Realistic Single Image Super-Resolution Using a GAN
why: SRGAN, super-resolusi fotorealistik pertama pakai GAN

author: Isola et al. (2016)
title: Image-to-Image Translation with Conditional Adversarial Networks
why: pix2pix, translasi gambar berpasangan, tinggal ganti dataset

author: Arjovsky et al. (2017)
title: Wasserstein GAN
why: WGAN, loss Wasserstein bikin training GAN jauh lebih stabil

author: Gulrajani et al. (2017)
title: Improved Training of Wasserstein GANs
why: WGAN-GP, gradient penalty ganti weight clipping yang norak

author: Zhu et al. (2017)
title: Unpaired Image-to-Image Translation using Cycle-Consistent Adversarial Networks
why: CycleGAN, translasi tanpa pasangan pakai cycle consistency

author: Tan & Le (2019)
title: EfficientNet: Rethinking Model Scaling for Convolutional Neural Networks
why: Scaling compound rapi, backbone efisien yang gampang dipakai

author: Karras et al. (2017)
title: Progressive Growing of GANs for Improved Quality, Stability, and Variation
why: ProGAN, gambar HD dengan naikin resolusi bertahap

author: Wang et al. (2018)
title: ESRGAN: Enhanced Super-Resolution Generative Adversarial Networks
why: Upgrade SRGAN pakai RRDB, tekstur super-res lebih natural

author: He et al. (2017)
title: Mask R-CNN
why: Instance segmentation standar, tambah branch mask ke Faster R-CNN

author: Dosovitskiy et al. (2020)
title: An Image is Worth 16x16 Words: Transformers for Image Recognition at Scale
why: ViT, gambar dipecah patch lalu masuk Transformer murni

author: Touvron et al. (2020)
title: Training data-efficient image transformers & distillation through attention
why: DeiT, latih ViT hemat data pakai distilasi, ga butuh JFT

author: He et al. (2019)
title: Momentum Contrast for Unsupervised Visual Representation Learning
why: MoCo, self-supervised pakai queue + momentum encoder

author: Chen et al. (2020)
title: A Simple Framework for Contrastive Learning of Visual Representations
why: SimCLR, kontrastif simpel tapi rakus augmentasi & batch gede

author: Brock et al. (2018)
title: Large Scale GAN Training for High Fidelity Natural Image Synthesis
why: BigGAN, GAN kelas berat, butuh compute besar buat ditiru

author: Karras et al. (2018)
title: A Style-Based Generator Architecture for Generative Adversarial Networks
why: StyleGAN, generator berbasis style, kontrol fitur per level

author: Grill et al. (2020)
title: Bootstrap Your Own Latent: A New Approach to Self-Supervised Learning
why: BYOL, self-supervised tanpa negatif, tricky biar ga collapse

author: Caron et al. (2020)
title: Unsupervised Learning of Visual Features by Contrasting Cluster Assignments
why: SwAV, kontras via cluster online + multi-crop, lumayan ribet

author: Carion et al. (2020)
title: End-to-End Object Detection with Transformers
why: DETR, deteksi end-to-end pakai set loss, no anchor/NMS

author: Karras et al. (2019)
title: Analyzing and Improving the Image Quality of StyleGAN
why: StyleGAN2, benerin artifact tetes air, kualitas makin gila

author: Radford et al. (2021)
title: Learning Transferable Visual Models From Natural Language Supervision
why: CLIP, latih vision-language kontrastif, zero-shot mantap

author: Caron et al. (2021)
title: Emerging Properties in Self-Supervised Vision Transformers
why: DINO, self-distillation ViT, fitur segmentasi muncul sendiri
